en: A PSALM OF ASAPH. The Mighty One, God the LORD, speaks and summons the earth from the rising of the sun to its setting.
zh: 大能者 神耶和華已經說話， 從日出之地到日落之處呼喚大地。

en: Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty, God shines forth.
zh: 神從全美的錫安， 已經彰顯榮光。

en: Our God comes; he does not keep silence; before him is a devouring fire, around him a mighty tempest.
zh: 我們的 神來臨，決不緘默無聲； 在他面前有火燃燒， 在他四周有暴風颳起。

en: He calls to the heavens above and to the earth, that he may judge his people:
zh: 他向天上、向地下呼喚， 為要審判自己的子民，說：

en: "Gather to me my faithful ones, who made a covenant with me by sacrifice!"
zh: “你們把我的聖民聚集到我這裡來， 就是那些用祭物與我立約的人。”

en: The heavens declare his righteousness, for God himself is judge! Selah
zh: 諸天宣揚他的公義， 因為 神自己就是審判者。

en: "Hear, O my people, and I will speak; O Israel, I will testify against you. I am God, your God.
zh: “我的子民哪！你們要聽，我要說話； 以色列啊！我要控訴你； 我是 神，是你的 神。

en: Not for your sacrifices do I rebuke you; your burnt offerings are continually before me.
zh: 我不是因你的祭物責備你， 你的燔祭常在我面前。

en: I will not accept a bull from your house or goats from your folds.
zh: 我不從你家裡取公牛， 也不從你羊圈中取公山羊。

en: For every beast of the forest is mine, the cattle on a thousand hills.
zh: 因為樹林中的百獸是我的， 千山上的牲畜也是我的。

en: I know all the birds of the hills, and all that moves in the field is mine.
zh: 山中的雀鳥我都認識， 田野的走獸也都屬我。

en: "If I were hungry, I would not tell you, for the world and its fullness are mine.
zh: 如果我餓了，我也不用對你說； 因為世界和其中所充滿的，都是我的。

en: Do I eat the flesh of bulls or drink the blood of goats?
zh: 難道我要吃公牛的肉嗎？ 要喝公山羊的血嗎？

en: Offer to God a sacrifice of thanksgiving, and perform your vows to the Most High,
zh: 你要以感謝為祭獻給 神， 又要向至高者還你的願。

en: and call upon me in the day of trouble; I will deliver you, and you shall glorify me."
zh: 在患難的日子，你呼求我。 我必搭救你，你也必尊敬我。”

en: But to the wicked God says: "What right have you to recite my statutes or take my covenant on your lips?
zh: 但 神對惡人說： “你怎麼敢述說我的律例， 你的口怎麼敢提到我的約呢？

en: For you hate discipline, and you cast my words behind you.
zh: 至於你，你憎恨管教， 並且把我的話丟在背後。

en: If you see a thief, you are pleased with him, and you keep company with adulterers.
zh: 你看見盜賊的時候，就樂於和他在一起； 你又與行淫的人有分。

en: "You give your mouth free rein for evil, and your tongue frames deceit.
zh: 你使你的口亂說壞話， 使你的舌頭編造謊言。

en: You sit and speak against your brother; you slander your own mother's son.
zh: 你經常毀謗你的兄弟， 誣衊你母親的兒子。

en: These things you have done, and I have been silent; you thought that I was one like yourself. But now I rebuke you and lay the charge before you.
zh: 你作了這些事，我默不作聲； 你以為我和你一樣？ 其實我要責備你，要當面指控你。

en: "Mark this, then, you who forget God, lest I tear you apart, and there be none to deliver!
zh: 忘記 神的人哪！你們要思想這事， 免得我把你們撕碎，沒有人能搭救。

en: The one who offers thanksgiving as his sacrifice glorifies me; to one who orders his way rightly I will show the salvation of God!"
zh: 凡是以感謝為祭獻上的，就是尊敬我； 那預備道路的，我必使他得見 神的救恩。”
